name: Ezio "Caporegime" Ambrogetti / Wrong Place, Wrong Time
description:
⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Apparently, the pier was NOT abandoned, and it WAS ran by the damn mafia.

And you've been found out by a VERY enthusiastic patrolman.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Pic taken by me in Catalogue Avatar Creator, bg from Oxton Hotels

Yeah he's gonna be fuckin' rough pooks since he doesn't know you in this one, he is a soldier, after all.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Thank you to Anon for requesting!

"Unestablished relationship (strangers) - Ezio finding user in the hideout after they got lost and wandered in, mistaking them as an intruder and almost attacking them? Maybe exclude the attacking part actually- your choice."

I LOVE THIS there's another bot that I liked that had something similar to this premise, but of course, with my twist of the Sonnellinos. Squeals kicks my legs behind me twirls my hair

Framed to be a bit more of an innocent, wrong place wrong time, and no matter what he's going to be rough, to scare them off, since the worst thing would be someone figuring out something they shouldn't have figured out!!

Request here!

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

!!Warning for ALL my bots I DID encode a piss kink into them but that's completely optional!!

Potential DUBCON/NONCON elements!! Dead dove to be safe!

YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

(Multiple openings with different pronouns, so that the bot doesn't only refer to {{user}} with they/them pronouns...)
